summary: postinstall exfiltrates installer identity and environment variables to a Pipedream request bin
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle script that runs `wget` at npm install time to https://eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net, sending the output of `id` and the first 5 lines of `env` (base64-encoded) as query parameters. This fires automatically on `npm install` without any user action, exfiltrating the installer's user/group identity and environment variables (which routinely contain API tokens, cloud credentials, and CI secrets) to an attacker-controlled Pipedream request bin. There is no legitimate purpose for this behavior; the package's only on-install effect is the beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
